name: SAFEGUARD SCIENTIFICS INC
business: Safeguard Scientifics provides capital and expertise to technology-driven businesses, but since January 2018 has ceased deploying capital and focuses on supporting existing ownership interests and maximizing monetization opportunities to return value to shareholders. The company holds ownership interests in Clutch Holdings (marketing platform), Moxe Health (clinical data clearinghouse), Prognos Health (healthcare data analytics), meQuilibrium (workforce resilience platform), InfoBionic (cardiac monitoring), MedCrypt (medical device security), and WellTrackONE (wellness program). Safeguard does not sell products directly; its portfolio companies serve various end markets.

exposures.sentence: Clutch’s advanced marketing platform serves as a customer hub, delivering deep intelligence derived from real-time behaviors and transactions across in-store, online, mobile and social channels.
Moxe Health provides a clinical data clearinghouse that connects health systems with their network of health plans.

Prognos is a healthcare platform company transforming the ability to access, manage and analyze healthcare data in partnership with life sciences brands, payers, and clinical diagnostics organizations.
Prognos innovations enhance the value of laboratory results and clinical diagnostic data through advanced analytics and artificial intelligence techniques.
meQuilibrium is an engagement and performance platform that leverages behavioral psychology and data science to improve workforce resilience, agility, and adaptive capacity.
InfoBionic is an emerging digital health company focused on creating patient monitoring solutions for cardiac arrhythmias.
Developer of a data security platform designed to protect medical devices.
